We are the Business Match Makers in Medical Aesthetics 

& Beauty industry. 

## Are you a manufacturer, a seller, or a reseller wanting to boost your sales and expand your business?

Wherever in the world you are from, we can help you.

The medical aesthetics & beauty field is highly competitive, and it is a challenge to market your products efficiently. At MYSQIN Consulting, we help your business stand out.

[GET IN TOUCH](https://mysqin-consulting.com/contact)

Fulfill your vision 

to grow better!

Even if you are new to the industry or the market, we are here to help you succeed and grow!

Contact us to

*   Market your product
*   Find distributors
*   Boost your sales

We can quickly

expedite

*   Connection process
*   Decrease your (re)search costs
*   Help you find the right partners
*   Target more business matches

## Ready to meet 

your most promising prospect?

### Are you one of the below?

*   I have the product, but no customers
*   I don’t have a network of distributors
*   I have an exclusive product, but the prospects aren’t aware of it

 Not anymore. Our expertise and resources will make your product a success.

### Expand locally and internationally

*   Boost your sales
*   Get the competitive advantage 
*   Diversify your market
*   Enjoy the low-cost benefits 
*   Get optimal resources

## We are ready. Are you?

#### We help you to grow your aesthetic business

## 1

 We help you find distributors

You need distributors and we have them. Our broad partner network is specialized in medical aesthetics and beauty industry. We are constantly on the lookout for new advanced products. Get ready to expand!

[EXPERIENCE HIGHER SALES](https://mysqin-consulting.com/contact)

## 2

We help you

increase your sales

We stay with you throughout the journey. After developing the branding and finding potential distributors for you, we make sure all your objectives are fulfilled. Together with you, we make your brand outshine the rest!

[WORK WITH US](https://mysqin-consulting.com/contact)

## 3 things you need to grow your business

[Finding a right partner](https://mysqin-consulting.com/)

We find a trustworthy and dependable partner for you in your target country. Not sure where your product will sell best? Our team will sit down with you and look within our network to shortlist the best alliances to assist you in expanding your business. We help you with search identification, negotiation, and finalizing the contract.

[Boosting your sales](https://mysqin-consulting.com/)

Combining marketing, sales, and business development, we plan and realize your overall performance and ways to increase your sales. We have experts in training, support, and management to aid in your business operations.

[Building a strong brand](https://mysqin-consulting.com/)

We study your product and offer marketing strategies that will help scale up your business. Your already established business is not growing? We will tweak your marketing strategies to align them with your business goals and make your brand get recognition quickly. We do this by optimizing your brand’s USPs and applying our proven guidelines for conventional and digital communication.

## Ready to witness increased sales with every step you walk with us?

[TIME TO TAKE ACTION](https://mysqin-consulting.com/contact)

#### Get to know us

## About us

MYSQIN Consulting is an energetic and proactive business match makers’ network of experts. The dynamic and performance-driven network includes three segments: branding, business development, and sales boosting. Every member of MYSQIN Consulting has a strong background in the beauty & medical aesthetics industry.

With our years of experience in successfully building, and growing competitive and sustainable businesses, we aim to support our clients who are sellers, manufacturers, and resellers through our in-depth expertise and connections. We access our EMEA distributors network to find the right partner for your business, market your products, and ensure that your sales grow.

![Image 2](https://www.mysqin-consulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/LOGO_MYSQIN_CONSULTING-1.svg)

## Our mission

We serve enterprises of different sizes. Every member of MYSQIN Consulting is passionate about helping businesses reach their full potential.

## Our expertise

We work with a variety of treatments and categories, such as:

*   Dermal fillers
*   Mesotherapy
*   PRP
*   Chemical peels
*   Cellulite treatment
*   Nutrition
*   Supplements

*   Hair transplant
*   Laser treatments
*   Contour threads
*   Carboxytherapy
*   Radio frequency
*   Photorejuvenation
*   Cosmetics & cosmeceuticals
*   Skincare
